homepage.heroSubline: Reliable electrical services from experienced professionals. Serving Boise and surrounding areas with integrity and expertise.
homepage.aboutTitle: Winters Electric: Your Trusted Boise Electrician
aboutText: Winters Electric LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable electrical services to our neighbors in Boise and beyond. We started small, wiring homes in the North End and slowly building a reputation for quality workmanship and unwavering commitment to safety.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, offer clear and transparent solutions, and execute our work with precision and care. We value integrity above all else, ensuring every project meets the highest standards of quality and code compliance. We're not just electricians; we're problem solvers dedicated to keeping your home or business powered safely and efficiently.

We are deeply rooted in the Boise community. We support local schools and organizations, and we believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much. From sponsoring youth sports teams to volunteering our electrical expertise for community projects, Winters Electric is committed to making Boise a better place to live and work.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Decades of combined experience handling any electrical challenge.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before work begins.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: Licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: We're available around the clock to handle urgent electrical issues.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Winters Electric today for a free quote and reliable electrical solutions.

services.name: Electrical Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for any electrical issue in your home or business.
services.description:
Winters Electric provides comprehensive electrical repair services throughout Boise and surrounding areas. From flickering lights and faulty outlets to complete power outages, our experienced electricians can quickly diagnose and resolve any electrical problem. We understand the importance of a safe and functional electrical system, especially during Boise's harsh weather extremes. Whether it's repairing damage from summer thunderstorms or addressing overloaded circuits during the winter months, we're equipped to handle it all.

We prioritize safety and efficiency in every repair. Our team uses advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the root cause of the issue and implement lasting solutions. We also ensure that all repairs meet current electrical codes and regulations, protecting your property and your family. We handle everything from minor repairs, like replacing damaged wiring, to major repairs, like fixing faulty electrical panels. 

Winters Electric stands behind our work. We offer a satisfaction guarantee on all repairs, so you can rest assured that you're receiving the highest quality service. Don't let electrical problems disrupt your life – call Winters Electric for prompt and professional repair services.
process: Step 1: Call us to describe your electrical issue.
Step 2: We schedule a convenient appointment time.
Step 3: Our electrician diagnoses the problem and provides a detailed estimate.
Step 4: We complete the repair efficiently and safely.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to arrive at your location as quickly as possible, often within the hour depending on your location in the Boise area.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed, bonded, and insured to protect you and your property.

faq.question: What types of electrical repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle all types of electrical repairs, from minor fixes like replacing outlets and switches to major repairs like rewiring and panel upgrades.

services.name: Electrical Installations
services.shortDescription: Expert electrical installations for new construction, remodels, and upgrades.
services.description:
Winters Electric specializes in electrical installations for residential and commercial properties in Boise, ID. Whether you're building a new home in Harris Ranch, remodeling your kitchen in the North End, or upgrading your business's electrical system downtown, we have the expertise to handle any installation project. We understand the unique electrical needs of Boise's diverse housing stock, from older bungalows to modern developments.

Our installation services include wiring for new construction, installing lighting fixtures, upgrading electrical panels, adding outlets and circuits, and installing smart home systems. We work closely with homeowners, contractors, and business owners to ensure that every installation meets their specific needs and complies with all local codes and regulations. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that all wiring is properly installed and that all connections are secure. 

With Winters Electric, you can be confident that your electrical installation will be done right the first time. We use only high-quality materials and employ industry-best practices to ensure long-lasting performance and safety. Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.
process: Step 1: Discuss your installation needs with our team.
Step 2: We provide a detailed estimate and project plan.
Step 3: Our electricians perform the installation with precision.
Step 4: We inspect the completed work and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: Do you handle electrical installations for new construction?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience with electrical installations for new residential and commercial construction projects in the Boise area.

faq.question: Can you install smart home systems?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can install and configure a wide range of smart home devices, including smart lighting, thermostats, and security systems.

faq.question: How long does a typical electrical installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of an electrical installation depends on the scope of the project. We'll provide you with a realistic timeline during the consultation process.

services.name: Lighting Services
services.shortDescription: Illuminate your home or business with our expert lighting solutions.
services.description:
Winters Electric offers comprehensive lighting services to enhance the beauty, functionality, and energy efficiency of your Boise property. From recessed lighting in your kitchen to landscape lighting in your backyard, we can design and install the perfect lighting solution to meet your needs and budget. We understand the importance of proper lighting, especially in Boise's long winter months.

Our lighting services include indoor lighting, outdoor lighting, landscape lighting, security lighting, and energy-efficient lighting upgrades. We work with a variety of lighting styles and technologies, including LED lighting, which can significantly reduce your energy consumption and lower your utility bills. Whether you're looking to create a warm and inviting atmosphere in your home or improve the security of your business, Winters Electric has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We offer free lighting consultations to help you explore your options and choose the best lighting solutions for your property. Our experienced electricians will assess your needs, provide expert recommendations, and handle all aspects of the installation process. Let Winters Electric bring your vision to light – contact us today to schedule a consultation.
process: Step 1: Schedule a free lighting consultation.
Step 2: We assess your needs and provide design recommendations.
Step 3: Our electricians install your new lighting system.
Step 4: We ensure your complete satisfaction with the results.

faq.question: Do you offer energy-efficient lighting solutions?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in energy-efficient lighting upgrades, including LED lighting, which can save you money on your utility bills.

faq.question: Can you help me design a landscape lighting system?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can design and install a custom landscape lighting system to enhance the beauty and security of your property.

faq.question: What types of indoor lighting do you install?
faq.answer: We install all types of indoor lighting, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, chandeliers, and track lighting.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Ensure your home's electrical system is safe and up-to-date with a panel upgrade.
services.description:
Winters Electric provides expert electrical panel upgrades for homes and businesses in Boise, ID. An outdated or overloaded electrical panel can be a safety hazard, increasing the risk of fire and electrical shock. If your panel is tripping frequently, showing signs of corrosion, or unable to handle your modern electrical demands, it's time for an upgrade. We understand the importance of a reliable electrical panel, especially with Boise's growing reliance on technology.

Our panel upgrade services include replacing old or damaged panels, increasing amperage capacity, and installing surge protection devices. We'll assess your electrical needs and recommend the appropriate panel upgrade to ensure that your system can safely and efficiently handle all of your electrical loads. We use only high-quality panels from trusted manufacturers and adhere to all local codes and regulations.

With Winters Electric, you can rest assured that your panel upgrade will be done safely and professionally. We'll handle all aspects of the project, from obtaining permits to disposing of the old panel. Protect your property and your family – contact Winters Electric today for a free panel upgrade consultation.
process: Step 1: Schedule a panel upgrade consultation.
Step 2: We assess your electrical needs and provide a recommendation.
Step 3: We obtain the necessary permits.
Step 4: Our electricians perform the panel upgrade safely and efficiently.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Common signs include frequent tripping breakers, flickering lights, and an outdated panel.

faq.question: What size panel do I need?
faq.answer: The size of the panel depends on your electrical needs. We'll assess your needs and recommend the appropriate size during the consultation.

faq.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: A typical panel upgrade takes one to two days to complete.

services.name: Wiring & Rewiring Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive wiring and rewiring services for homes and businesses throughout Boise.
services.description:
Winters Electric offers expert wiring and rewiring services for residential and commercial properties in Boise and surrounding areas. Whether you're building a new home, remodeling an existing space, or need to replace outdated or damaged wiring, we have the expertise to handle any wiring project. We understand the importance of safe and reliable wiring, especially in Boise's older homes.

Our wiring services include new construction wiring, remodeling wiring, rewiring, and electrical code corrections. We use only high-quality wiring materials and adhere to all local codes and regulations. Our experienced electricians will ensure that your wiring is properly installed and that all connections are secure. We handle everything from running new circuits to replacing old aluminum wiring with safer copper wiring.

With Winters Electric, you can be confident that your wiring project will be done right the first time. We offer free wiring consultations to assess your needs and provide a detailed estimate. Protect your property and your family – contact Winters Electric today for reliable wiring services.
process: Step 1: Schedule a wiring consultation.
Step 2: We assess your needs and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: Our electricians perform the wiring or rewiring.
Step 4: We inspect the completed work and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: When should I consider rewiring my home?
faq.answer: If your home has outdated wiring, such as aluminum wiring, or if you're experiencing frequent electrical problems, it's time to consider rewiring.

faq.question: Do you handle wiring for new construction?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience with wiring for new residential and commercial construction projects in the Boise area.

faq.question: How much does rewiring cost?
faq.answer: The cost of rewiring depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate during the consultation.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for Boise businesses.
services.description:
Winters Electric provides comprehensive commercial electrical services to businesses throughout Boise, ID. We understand the unique electrical demands of commercial properties and offer a wide range of services to keep your business running smoothly and safely. From office buildings and retail stores to restaurants and industrial facilities, we have the expertise to handle any commercial electrical project. We are familiar with Boise's diverse commercial landscape and the specific electrical needs of businesses in the area.

Our commercial electrical services include electrical installations, repairs, maintenance, and upgrades. We can handle everything from wiring for new construction to installing energy-efficient lighting systems. We also offer 24/7 emergency service to address urgent electrical issues. Our experienced electricians are trained to work efficiently and safely, minimizing disruption to your business operations.

With Winters Electric, you can be confident that your commercial electrical needs are in good hands. We are committed to providing reliable, cost-effective solutions that meet your specific requirements. Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.
process: Step 1: Schedule a commercial electrical consultation.
Step 2: We assess your needs and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: Our electricians perform the work efficiently and safely.
Step 4: We ensure your complete satisfaction with the results.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized maintenance contracts to ensure the ongoing reliability of your electrical system.

faq.question: Can you help me upgrade to energy-efficient lighting?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can design and install energy-efficient lighting systems that will save you money on your utility bills.

faq.question: What types of commercial properties do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of commercial properties, including office buildings, retail stores, restaurants, and industrial facilities.

serviceAreas.content:
Winters Electric LLC is proud to provide top-notch electrical services to the residents and businesses of Boise, Idaho. As the state's capital and largest city, Boise presents unique electrical needs, from historic homes requiring careful wiring upgrades to modern commercial buildings demanding efficient and reliable power solutions. Our team of licensed and experienced electricians is well-versed in addressing the diverse electrical challenges faced by Boise residents. We are committed to delivering safe, effective, and affordable solutions, ensuring your electrical systems operate flawlessly. 

Whether you're dealing with flickering lights, a faulty outlet, or require a complete electrical system overhaul, Winters Electric LLC is here to help. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including electrical repairs, installations, panel upgrades, lighting solutions, and more. Our dedication to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted name in the Boise community. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and experience the Winters Electric LLC difference.

Winters Electric LLC understands the importance of energy efficiency in Boise. We offer services such as LED lighting upgrades and smart home integrations to help you save money on your energy bills and reduce your carbon footprint.
serviceAreas.localContext: Boise's blend of urban living and outdoor recreation creates a unique demand for reliable electrical services that can support both modern amenities and recreational equipment.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Winters Electric did a fantastic job upgrading our electrical panel. Our old panel was outdated and couldn't handle our modern appliances. The electrician was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly. The work was completed quickly and efficiently, and we haven't had any issues since. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: I hired Winters Electric to install new recessed lighting in my kitchen. The electrician arrived on time, was courteous, and did a great job with the installation. The lighting looks fantastic, and it has completely transformed the space. My only minor complaint is that the cleanup could have been a little better, but overall, I'm very happy with the service.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: We had a power outage in our home, and Winters Electric was able to come out quickly and diagnose the problem. The electrician found a faulty breaker and replaced it promptly. He was very professional and explained everything clearly. I was impressed with their fast response time and excellent service.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Winters Electric did an excellent job wiring our new home. The electricians are very skilled and knowledgeable. The work was completed on time and within budget. Highly recommend them for any electrical needs.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Winters Electric has been our go-to electrician for our restaurant for years. They always respond quickly, and their work is top-notch. We recently had them install new lighting in our dining area, and it looks amazing. We appreciate their professionalism and reliability.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: I had an electrical emergency late at night, and Winters Electric was able to come out within an hour. The electrician was able to quickly diagnose and fix the problem, preventing further damage to my home. I was very grateful for their prompt and professional service.
